response.justification: Despite extensive software experience, the candidate lacks relevant Java proficiency for the role, has only basic German language skills (a hard requirement), and holds senior-level roles inconsistent with an entry-level position, raising concerns about fit, salary expectations, and alignment with junior responsibilities.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and domains
Strong track record in agile practices, TDD, CI/CD, and open-source contributions
Demonstrated ability to lead, teach, and build developer tooling and infrastructure
concerns: Java experience is minimal and not primary in recent roles; not aligned with required proficiency
German language skill is only basic, failing the mandatory communication requirement
Senior-level titles and experience suggest overqualification and misalignment with entry-level role
